column1: # 🧬 Regulatory Network from Real ARCHS4 Expression Data

This repository contains a **regulatory network** reconstructed from real ARCHS4 RNA-seq data (5000 genes, 200 samples). The network identifies significant correlations between potential regulators and target genes.
- **ARCHS4**: Uniformly processed RNA-seq data from GEO/SRA
1. Download and install Cytoscape from https://cytoscape.org
3. Apply layout: Layout → Attribute Circle Layout
